summary: Risk Engine v3 testing complete. All 25 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend Mission Control page renders correctly with new v3 fields. Backend API returns all enriched fields: riskScore, severity, trajectory, confidence, interventionType, riskSignals, explanationShort, whyNow, recommendedActionByRole, secondaryRisks. Stage-aware weighting works (Offer > Added), compound risk rules fire correctly, items sorted by riskScore descending. Legacy fields preserved for backward compatibility.
critical_code_review_comments: Risk Engine v3 implementation is clean and well-structured with comprehensive CONSTANTS for signals, stages, and compound rules
evaluate_risk() returns all required v3 fields correctly
Compound risk interactions properly apply multipliers (1.25-1.50x)
Stage multipliers correctly boost scores (Offer=1.5x, Added=0.8x)
Trajectory inference uses recent_actions_count correctly for 'improving' detection
All enum values constrained to valid sets (severity, trajectory, confidence, interventionType)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Engine v3 fully implemented and tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_risk_engine_v3.py covers: (1) All v3 field presence, (2) Enum value validation, (3) Stage-aware weighting (Offer vs Added), (4) Compound risk interactions, (5) Trajectory inference, (6) Sorting by riskScore DESC, (7) Legacy backward compatibility. Frontend Director Inbox renders all items correctly with HIGH PRIORITY and AT RISK groups.

verified_features.1_all_v3_fields_present: PASS - riskScore, severity, trajectory, confidence, interventionType, riskSignals, explanationShort, whyNow, recommendedActionByRole, secondaryRisks
verified_features.2_riskScore_0_100: PASS - All items have riskScore as integer 0-100
verified_features.3_severity_enum: PASS - All items have severity in [low, medium, high, critical]
verified_features.4_trajectory_enum: PASS - All items have trajectory in [improving, stable, worsening]
verified_features.5_confidence_enum: PASS - All items have confidence in [low, medium, high]
verified_features.6_interventionType_enum: PASS - All items have interventionType in [monitor, nudge, review, escalate, blocker]
verified_features.7_stage_aware_weighting: PASS - Offer stage (1.5x) scores higher than Added (0.8x) for same signal
verified_features.8_compound_risk: PASS - escalation + no_activity scores >= either alone
verified_features.9_recommendedActionByRole_keys: PASS - Contains director/coach/family keys with contextual actions
verified_features.10_whyNow_non_empty: PASS - All items have non-empty whyNow string
verified_features.11_sorted_by_riskScore_desc: PASS - Items sorted by riskScore descending [100, 100, 60, 55, 35]
verified_features.12_legacy_fields_present: PASS - id, athleteName, issues, priority, group, cta all present
verified_features.13_frontend_renders: PASS - Mission Control page renders with Top Priority card, HIGH PRIORITY group, AT RISK group
